回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	114學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 觀光英文 (English for Tourism)	開課班級 : 應英二年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 羅主恩	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
This course includes topics such as: Course Orientation. What is tourism? What is tourism? What's your kind of tourism? Careers in tourism and hospitality Tourism marketing The business of events tourism The business of fun Tourism and culture; Managing people and money Managing people and money; External influences Information, strategy and change Late Assignments: All assignments are due on the dates announced. Assignments turned in after the relevant due date will NOT be accepted. Late Assignments: All assignments are due on the dates announced. Assignments turned in after the relevant due date will NOT be accepted.

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Evaluation: Mid-term examination = 35% Final examination = 35% Participation = 30% (Attendance; handouts & quizzes, class participation, etc.)  
Attendance: One class or 2 hours will be permitted without penalty; 1 point will be subtracted from your FINAL GRADE for every additional hour of absence. If you are more than 10 minutes late, you are counted as absent for that hour, 
Attendance: 2 class absences are permitted without penalty, but all assignments are required. Make sure you contact another student for notes, assignments, or hand-outs prior to the next class. Being 10-minutes late for class is regarded as an absence. Late Assignments: All assignments are due on the dates announced. Assignments turned in after the relevant due date will NOT be accepted.
